message.content:
@startuml
actor "loggedInOrgAdmin" as loggedInOrgAdmin
participant "frontend" as frontend
participant "UserController" as UserController
participant "UserService" as UserService
participant "AclUpdateHelper" as AclUpdateHelper

loggedInOrgAdmin -> frontend: add coach role for myself
frontend -> UserController: addCoachRoleToOrgAdmin(org_id)
UserController -> UserService: addCoachRoleToLoggedInUser(org_id) (Check user is org admin)
UserService -> AclUpdateHelper: add acl permission to user
@enduml
